body_txt: This is the character who always has an infuriatingly smug expression on their face. They think they're better than you, and it shows. They may not be a Smug Snake entirely; either they're not a proper villain (just an annoying jerk), or they're only disdainful to certain people (mostly The Hero ). See also Smug Snake and Smug Super , for more villainous/heroic versions; that said, this trope doesn't necessarily not involve them. Villainous versions are usually denoted by Tsurime Eyes , more benign or heroic examples usually have Dreary Half-Lidded Eyes . Both versions are usually big users of the Fascinating Eyebrow . Compare Psychotic Smirk , Slasher Smile , DreamWorks Face , and Cheshire Cat Grin for much the same reaction.
